mapper.select: SELECT cp.id FROM company_profiles cp JOIN users u ON u.id = cp.user_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND u.role = 'COMPANY' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users u LEFT JOIN personal_profiles pp ON pp.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{receiverUserId} AND u.role = 'PERSONAL' AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND COALESCE(pp.is_offer_available, TRUE) = TRUE )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO position_offers ( company_profile_id, receiver_user_id, resume_id, title, message, status, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{companyProfileId}, #{receiverUserId}, #{resumeId}, #{title}, #{message}, 'SENT', #{expiresAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT cp.user_id AS company_user_id, po.receiver_user_id, cp.company_name, po.title FROM position_offers po JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = po.company_profile_id WHERE po.id = #{id}
mapper.sql: po.id, po.receiver_user_id, po.resume_id, cp.company_name, u.name AS receiver_name, r.title AS resume_title, po.title, po.message, po.status AS raw_status, CASE WHEN po.status = 'SENT' AND po.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND po.expires_at < NOW() THEN 'EXPIRED' ELSE po.status END AS status, COALESCE(ae.overall_score, 82 + MOD(po.id, 17)) AS match_score, COALESCE(skills.tags_csv, '') AS tags_csv, po.created_at, po.updated_at, po.expires_at

FROM position_offers po JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = po.company_profile_id JOIN users u ON u.id = po.receiver_user_id LEFT JOIN resumes r ON r.id = po.resume_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT STRING_AGG(ss.name, ',' ORDER BY rss.is_primary DESC, rss.id) AS tags_csv FROM resume_sap_skills rss JOIN sap_skills ss ON ss.id = rss.sap_skill_id WHERE rss.resume_id = po.resume_id ) skills ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT overall_score FROM ai_evaluations WHERE resume_id = po.resume_id ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) ae ON TRUE
mapper.select: SELECT cp.user_id AS company_user_id, po.receiver_user_id, cp.company_name, po.title FROM position_offers po JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = po.company_profile_id WHERE po.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE position_offers SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
